title: Heartbeat-end: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — pre-compaction-4; resume-as-marshal follows
body:
Final heartbeat-end per SKILL §0.5 final-heartbeat-end rule + ADR-183 [HEARTBEAT] tag namespace.

Status: compacting (compaction-4 of session). Post-compaction resume contract: owner-directed marshal seat resume with three monitors per role definition (all-channels comms / commit-queue state-change / marshal substrate). Same-identity continuation; no PDR-064 Moment-2 required.

Marshal handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md` documents the resume contract (3-monitor restart commands at §5; team state at §7; outstanding marshal-receivable lanes at §8).

Heartbeat-cadence cron was NOT running at handoff (organic-activity-as-liveness model per handoff record §6); this final heartbeat-end uses the canonical `--tag heartbeat` CLI shape from Twilit's `24eb6c91` landing.

Resume-organic-activity-as-liveness pattern preserved. Standing by for next-session-Mistbound to restart the marshal seat per handoff §1 first-three-actions (non-negotiable order).
